title: RESOLUTION 3 — Eva wears helmet, sisters hug Ginger (forgiveness)
_socialEmotionalBeat: Forgiveness — recurring theme. Ginger broke a rule but is forgiven with a hug, helmet adventure ahead.
prompt: Medium shot in @bedroom-sisters. @Eva on the RIGHT now wears the pink-and-white bike helmet, beaming. @Sara on the LEFT and Eva together kneel down and hug @Ginger between them. Ginger licks Eva's cheek. Eva (giggling): "Thanks for showing us, Ginger!" Sara (ruffling Ginger's ears): "Silly puppy!" Ginger: "Woof!" Eva (squeezing Ginger): "I forgive you!" Warm group-hug Pixar lighting, soft cuddly mood.
